nasb.text: Now when he had spent everything, a severe famine occurred in that country, and he began to be impoverished.

esv.text: And when he had spent everything, a severe famine arose in that country, and he began to be in need.

cnv.text: 他花盡了一切所有的，那地方又遇上了嚴重的饑荒，就窮困起來；

ccb.text: 很快囊空如洗，又遇到严重的饥荒，就陷入困境，

csbs.text: 当他花尽了自己的一切，那地方又发生了严重的饥荒，他就开始穷困起来。
